title: native.file.pick
description: Open the OS-native file picker with type filters and return the user-selected absolute path. Cancellation is a non-error null response. Implemented over @tauri-apps/plugin-dialog with directory=false, multiple=false. Used by master-calibration selection for FITS, XISF, and TIFF files.

filters.description: Ordered list of file-type filters. The first filter is the default. Extensions MUST NOT include the leading dot.

extensions.description: Extensions without leading dot. The wildcard '*' is ONLY valid in a filter named exactly 'All files'; the server returns filters.invalid if '*' appears in any other filter row (D-004-1).

default_path.description: Optional absolute path to anchor the dialog (typically the calibration source root). Honored where supported.

path.description: Absolute OS-canonical path the user selected, or null when the user cancelled.

selected_filter.description: The name of the filter active when the user clicked Open. Useful for recording the user's declared frame type.

picker.unavailable.description: The host environment does not provide a native file picker.

filters.invalid.description: The supplied filter list violated the schema: empty list, malformed extension, duplicate name, or '*' used in a filter not named exactly 'All files' (D-004-1).

os.command_failed.description: The OS-native dialog returned an unexpected failure. Cancellation is NOT an error.
